derived.causal_summary: An 11-lineage multi-model deep review found a P1: the reap fix's O_EXCL spawn-mutex claim did not hold for the stale-owner-lease reclaim branch, so concurrent fresh launchers could both reap+respawn. Fixed by serializing the stale reclaim under the existing respawn lock, refusing respawn on unconfirmed SIGKILL, fixing two 096-packet comment-hygiene violations plus the checker reversed-ordering gap, and hardening the live test execSync helpers to spawnSync.
